title: Process Event
description: Structural schema companion for contract: process-run/v0. One line of the append-only NDJSON event stream a running process emits. Envelope fields are contract-governed; the data payload is producer-owned (payload-open, metadata-governed). Emission is fail-open: producers must never block or crash on telemetry.

event.description: Event kind. Core kinds have contract semantics; x- kinds are producer-specific.

seq.description: Monotonic per-run sequence number. Gaps indicate loss; regression indicates corruption.

producer.description: Optional on events (the card is the discovery root); recommended on 'started'.

context_id.description: Larger execution scope (batch pipeline, scheduled job, CLI session).

data.description: Producer-owned payload (payload-open). Terminal events SHOULD carry data.artifacts (see $defs.artifactRef) linking produced data-artifact descriptors; progress events SHOULD carry data.done/data.total.

lifecycle.description: The produced artifact's lifecycle claim, per contract: data-artifact/v0.

descriptor.description: Path or reference to the artifact descriptor.

artifactRef.description: Recommended shape for entries of data.artifacts on terminal events — the bridge to contract: data-artifact/v0. Not enforced by this schema (data is payload-open).
